notes: Immortal 1.44 — merges upstream 1.42 & 1.43 (screensaver clock faces + picker, self-hosted photo sources via QR, calendar widget from a public iCal link, dimmed overnight night clock, Home Assistant over MQTT with TLS, top-bar app switcher, new iCloud shared-album links) into the @GodricTM feature fork (ISS, aurora, sunrise, lamp, kitchen timers, room ping, chimes, system-wide touch & keypress sounds and more).
